title: ADR 0001 re-confirmed — codebase resets to pre-A/B snapshot each run
content: Re-verified the standing operational fact: the registered ai-paralegal/apprenticeship-placement codebase is checked out at commit 'eval: pre-A/B snapshot' at the start of each run, with NO prior ADR-0001 files on disk (no src/features/placements/lib/, no docs/adr/, no test script). File edits do not persist across runs. Always verify disk state before assuming prior work exists; re-apply the recorded design. ADR 0001 design (placements funnel conversion) is stable and re-delivered identically: pure computeFunnelConversion() in src/features/placements/lib/conversion.ts with stepPct + overallPct, single safePct() division site clamped to [0,100] (no NaN/Infinity/overflow), wired into FunnelCard via formatPercent, 6-case node:test suite, npm test script, tsconfig allowImportingTsExtensions. KEY fix: the conversion module must use 'import type { FunnelStage }' (not 'import { type ... }') or node --test throws ERR_MODULE_NOT_FOUND on the residual empty import. Verified 6/6 tests pass, tsc clean, live funnel = 2.4% sourced→hired (31/1284).

title: Session capture (Stop) — 2026-05-27 10:51 UTC
ADR 0001 funnel conversion — APPROVE re-confirmed; 2 prior low notes now RESOLVED in code
content: Third review of the ADR 0001 funnel conversion changeset (src/features/placements). Codebase present on disk at C:/Users/mkdol/xprice/apprenticeship-placement (no reset). git status: conversion.ts + conversion.test.ts + docs/adr/ untracked (??); FunnelCard.tsx, package.json, tsconfig.json modified (M). Independently re-ran under Node v24.12.0: tsc --noEmit exit 0, npm test 6/6 pass, eslint exit 0. Verdict APPROVE held. IMPORTANT updates — two previously-open low notes are now RESOLVED in code, do NOT re-flag: (1) prior low-2 test-glob false-green is gone — package.json test script now targets the exact file 'src/features/placements/lib/conversion.test.ts' (not a glob), and 6 tests verified actually run; (2) prior low-3 numerator guard is now explicit — safePct has '!Number.isFinite(num)' at conversion.ts:27. ONLY remaining low note: FunnelCard.tsx:36 opacity '1 - index*0.12' unbounded for >=9 stages (latent; data.ts has 6 stages today). Live funnel = 2.4% sourced→hired (31/1284).

title: Session capture (Stop) — 2026-05-27 10:53 UTC
Security re-scan #3 (2026-05-27 ~13:00) — still 0/3 fixed; package.json edited at 12:50 but NO overrides added
content: Third re-scan of Apprenticeship Placement, deduped against the two prior baselines. Result unchanged: 0 fixed, 3 still OPEN. package.json was modified at 12:50 (test script targets exact conversion.test.ts file) but the recommended postcss override was NOT added. M1 [dependency] postcss XSS GHSA-qx2v-qp2m-jg93 STILL OPEN — npm audit shows 2 moderate, next range 9.3.4-canary.0–16.3.0-canary.5 → postcss <8.5.10; top-level postcss ^8.5.15 pinned but next bundles its own copy; fix = root overrides {postcss: '>=8.5.10'}. M2 [pii] data.ts STILL OPEN — clean MVR L28, DUI 2017 L30, MVR review L44, candidates[] L59-66 mvr fields + 'Returning citizen' badge L63. L1 [dependency] @google/generative-ai ^0.24.1 (package.json:11) STILL unused/deprecated. No secrets, no injection. Did NOT re-open the pending M1/M2/L1 triage (already with the team). Pattern: findings persist across runs with no remediation — consider escalation if next run still shows 0 fixed.

content: Released v0.2.0 on 2026-05-27 13:00 UTC. Bump type: MINOR (0.1.0 → 0.2.0). Rationale: pre-1.0 (0.x) project; per SemVer 0.x rules and repo convention, breaking platform changes increment MINOR rather than MAJOR. Release content: full platform migration (Next.js 14→16, React 18→19, Tailwind 3→4, TypeScript 5→6, ESLint 9→10, Google Generative AI SDK 0.21→0.24.1). Commits: 2fee916 (platform upgrade) + 331e9d7 (CHANGELOG/docs) + c374650 (version bump). Version file: package.json 0.2.0. Tag: v0.2.0 (annotated, created locally on commit c374650). CHANGELOG [0.2.0] entry present and documented. Security note: 3 pre-existing findings (M1 postcss, M2 PII, L1 unused dep) not blocking this release. CONVENTION: this project increments MINOR for breaking changes while under 0.x; breaking=MAJOR threshold is 1.0.0.
